creator: raimeetravel
caption:
#ExpediaAmbassador I’m shocked by some of the 2026 @expedia Air Hacks data, but I’m glad I know now because it will ACTUALLY save us big money when planning our 2026 trips!! Reference this before you book your next flight and thank me later!

Comment REPORT and I’ll send you the full trend report (there are a ton of other helpful data points!) 

#traveltrends #traveldata

transcription.text: this new travel data that I just found is completely changing the way I'm planning my trips this year so that I can save more money, so let's get into it. First point was very shocking to me, and this is according to Expedia's 2026 Air Hacks report, the cheapest day to fly in 2026 is actually a Friday. The second thing, and this was also shocking to me, is that the cheapest month to fly is August, and the most expensive is December. And this is even more specific, but if you can avoid flying on these days, you will save money. And these are the cheapest days to fly this year, and I love booking all of my travel on Expedia because when I bundle my flights, my hotel, and my car rental all together, I can save up to 30% on the entire vacation. The more things you bundle on Expedia, the more you can save. I just love knowing all of this travel data because it really does help me save money when I'm planning my trips, even before I start booking things. If you want to read the rest of the report because there's a lot of interesting things in there, comment report below and I will send it to you. And remember, when you're booking your next trip, you can save up to 30% when you bundle everything together on Expedia. Okay, I hope this was helpful. Safe travels. Bye!
